name: Applied Identities
tagline: The architecture of what comes next.
description: Applied Identities helps growth-market companies build the strategic identity layer that makes AI systems reason and act as authentic extensions of the organization.

frameworks.name: Character
frameworks.description: The principles that hold under pressure — what wins when values conflict, what your organization will not trade away for speed or margin. Delivered as your Company Constitution.

frameworks.name: Voice
frameworks.description: The reasoning behind how your organization communicates — not tone, but logic. So AI navigates new situations instead of pattern-matching. Delivered as Agent Soul Documents.

frameworks.name: Judgment
frameworks.description: The decision patterns your best people execute instinctively — what to escalate, when to make exceptions, how to handle situations the policy did not anticipate. Delivered as Human Guidebook and Interaction Protocols.
